suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document when truthsuite evidence-anchor comments are acceptable after service decomposition and how to keep them synchronized with contract assertions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The manufacturing fix review confirmed passing behavior required retained comment anchors in PackingService and BulkPackingService for snippet-based truthsuite contracts after logic extraction.

rejectedObservations.observation: Minor duplicate helper methods (e.g., requireWholePackCount, trimReference, buildPackReference) across bulk packing sub-services.
rejectedObservations.reason: feature-specific and non-blocking; tracked in feature review issues rather than shared-state guidance

rejectedObservations.observation: postPackingJournal usage alongside createStandardJournal in packing services.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of the round-1 manufacturing-polish guidance recommendation
